title: christella flaccida
intro: Christella flaccida, also known as the Japanese chain fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christella flaccida include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
